title: FR Index Entry (Schema U, row-level data model)
description: In-memory FRIndexEntry shape that index_gen.ts renders into specs/INDEX.md. Schema U at the markdown level is a rendered view of a sorted array of these entries. See technical-spec.md §8.3/§8.7.

status.description: Archived FRs excluded from the default index (AC-45.3).

path.description: Relative path from specs/ used as the link target.

primary_tracker.description: Primary tracker ref shown in the INDEX; alphabetical-first key in frontmatter.tracker.
